title: GBFS Bikeshare Feeds
verification_hints: GBFS discovery JSON and version must be validated downstream.
Endpoint freshness and system identity must be checked before use.
Real-time feeds are not automatically suitable for historical trip analysis.
access_notes: GBFS is an open data standard for public shared-mobility availability feeds.
Concrete system feeds still require discovery URL, version, freshness, and schema validation.
migration_note: Bikeshare source priors should migrate from known URLs into GBFS SourceCard metadata and feed-inspection scripts.
